case_title: ALONZO, PEDRO M. vs. EMPEX VENTURES INC/DBA INDUSTRIAL PASSENGER SERV.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALONZO, PEDRO M. AS TO DEFENDANT EMPEX VENTURES INC/DBA INDUSTRIAL PASSENGER SERV.
